task: Close out operational hardening and activate alert maturity epic
acceptance_criteria: Operational hardening close-out is explicit and Alert Maturity parent truth artifacts exist
notes: Epic 02 evidence selected Alert Maturity as the next active epic

task: Freeze alert lifecycle contract and persistence boundary
acceptance_criteria: Alert state machine, repository contract, and persistence baseline can carry on-call workflow semantics without shadow truth
validation_command: uv run pytest tests/alerting_contract tests/api/alerting tests/integration/alert_pipeline
notes: Expanded alert contract to OPEN/ACKNOWLEDGED/RESOLVED, switched evaluation to active-alert semantics, added PostgreSQL schema v2, and passed schema/alert/recovery live gates

task: Implement alert dedupe suppression and grouping controls
acceptance_criteria: Noise-control policies are explicit, testable, and do not silently drop root-cause evidence
validation_command: uv run pytest tests/alerting_noise tests/integration/alert_pipeline && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/test-alert-pipeline-postgres.ps1
notes: Locked group key to rule_id+instance_id, added windowed SUPPRESSED evidence on repeated active matches, and passed unit/integration/PostgreSQL live gate coverage

task: Implement acknowledge ownership and notes workflow
acceptance_criteria: On-call actions mutate persistent alert state with auditable history and consistent API semantics
notes: Added acknowledge/owner/note workflow actions, retry-safe same-user ack/owner semantics, and API coverage for resolved-alert rejection

task: Implement notifier delivery evidence and escalation semantics
acceptance_criteria: Delivery attempts, failures, and retry/escalation boundaries stay explicit under the new workflow semantics
validation_command: uv run pytest tests/alerting_delivery tests/recovery && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/test-recovery-paths.ps1
notes: Workflow-aware retry suppression now stops only would-retry branches after ACK/owner changes, records explicit NOTIFICATION_SUPPRESSED evidence, and passed unit/integration/live recovery gates

task: Implement API and web triage surfaces for on-call workflow
acceptance_criteria: API/OpenAPI/client/web surfaces expose the new alert workflow without drifting from backend truth
validation_command: uv run pytest tests/api/alerting && pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter web build
notes: Alert detail/list pages now expose owner and acknowledge state, triage server actions are wired through typed client calls, and pytest/web/ts/build/biome checks passed

acceptance_criteria: Epic 03 signoff passes from repository root and captures alert maturity gate evidence
notes: Recovered a missing-PowerShell + missing-node_modules blocker with a repo-local shim and frozen install, then passed the full repository-root alert maturity signoff
